Issue: Image missing alt attribute (logo.png). Screen readers cannot describe this image.
Recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute, or alt="" with role="presentation" if decorative.

Issue: No landmark regions (header, main, nav, footer). Assistive technology users cannot navigate page structure.
Recommendation: Wrap content in semantic landmark elements: <header>, <main>, etc.

Issue: No skip-navigation link. Keyboard-only users must tab through all links.
Recommendation: Add a Skip to content link before the first focusable element.

Issue: Duplicate id="card-item" when Card is rendered in a list. Violates HTML uniqueness requirement.
Recommendation: Remove the static id or generate a unique id per instance (e.g., useId() hook).

Issue: Click handler on a <div> without keyboard support. Not focusable, fails WCAG 2.1.1.
Recommendation: Use a <button> element, or add role="button", tabIndex={0}, and onKeyDown handler.

Issue: Heading level <h3> used without guaranteed parent <h2> context. May break heading hierarchy.
Recommendation: Make the heading level configurable via an as prop.

Issue: Missing <meta name="description">. Hurts search snippet and click-through rate.
Recommendation: Add <meta name="description" content="..."> with 120-160 character summary.

Issue: No structured data (JSON-LD). No machine-readable schema for rich results.
Recommendation: Add <script type="application/ld+json"> with WebPage or Organization schema.

Issue: No Open Graph / Twitter Card meta tags for social sharing.
Recommendation: Add og:title, og:description, og:image and twitter:* tags.

Issue: Render-blocking CSS loaded synchronously in <head>. Delays First Contentful Paint.
Recommendation: Use media="print" onload pattern or inline critical CSS.

Issue: @font-face missing font-display: swap. Text invisible until font loads (FOIT).
Recommendation: Add font-display: swap; to the @font-face rule.

Issue: Image promo.png lacks width/height attributes. Contributes to CLS.
Recommendation: Add width and height attributes matching intrinsic dimensions.

Issue: XSS: innerHTML set with unsanitized user input from location.hash.
Recommendation: Use textContent instead of innerHTML, or sanitize with DOMPurify.

Issue: console.log left in production code. Clutters console and may leak data.
Recommendation: Remove or guard behind a debug flag.

Issue: document.querySelector used inside React component instead of ref.
Recommendation: Use useRef to reference and manipulate the element.
